metaDescription: Sentroy brand assets — logos, marks and colors.
title: Brand
subtitle: Sentroy's logos, marks and colors. Preview the assets, download what you need, and follow the palette.
logosDesc: Use the light logo on dark surfaces and the dark logo on light surfaces. SVG is preferred; PNG is provided for raster use.
colorsDesc: Click a swatch to copy its hex.
note: Keep clear space around the logo and never stretch, recolor or add effects to the mark.
